sections.paragraph: <entryFree id="n3012" key="a)kataskh/nwtos" type="main" opt="n" TEIform="entryFree"> <orth extent="suff" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">ἀκατα-σκήνωτος</orth>, <itype lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="itype">ον</itype>, <sense id="n3012.0" n="A" level="1" opt="n" TEIform="sense"> <tr_ opt="n" TEIform="tr">unsuitable for encampment</tr_>, <cit TEIform="cit"> <quote_ lang="greek" TEIform="quote">τόπος</quote_> <bibl n="urn:cts:greekLit:tlg0648.tlg001.perseus-grc1:10:17" default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <author TEIform="author">Onos.</author> <biblScope TEIform="biblScope">10.17</biblScope></bibl></cit>.</sense> </entryFree>
